name: svg-sketch
description: Canvas-based SVG diagram editor for creating and editing .svg files in VS Code

svg-sketch.shapeDefaultsSvgPath.description: Path to a custom SVG file that defines default shape styles. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults. The SVG must follow the same format as the bundled shapeDefaults.svg.

svg-sketch.templateDir.description: Directory to store diagram templates (relative to workspace root)

svg-sketch.defaultStroke.description: Default stroke color for newly created shapes (hex color).

svg-sketch.defaultFill.description: Default fill color for newly created shapes (hex color).

svg-sketch.defaultLineWidth.description: Default line width for newly created shapes.

svg-sketch.screenshotPasteEnabled.description: Enable pasting screenshots/images from clipboard into the canvas.

svg-sketch.screenshotPasteMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of pasted screenshots in pixels.
